title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF TWO MILLION FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-EIGHT THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED FORTY-FOUR PESOS AS ADDITIONAL FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE BUREAU OF PRISONS DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY FIRST, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-EIGHT TO JUNE THIRTIETH, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-NINE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1994 / 54 OG No. 16, 4698 (July 28, 1958)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2078, June 13, 1958 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF TWO MILLION FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-EIGHT THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED FORTY-FOUR PESOS AS ADDITIONAL FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE BUREAU OF PRISONS DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY FIRST, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-EIGHT TO JUNE THIRTIETH, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-NINE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sums are hereby appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated as additional appropriation for the operation of the Bureau of Prisons during the period from July 1, 1958 to June 30, 1959:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 13, 1958.
